data.body: EPIC BLOCKED on completion-verifier: 3 unmet ACs BEYOND remediation scope — AC1 (private-key write-guard, missing since ddbe), AC7 (enforcement CLI shape: verify-identity name + --since grandfathering + JSON report + CI workflow; delivered verify-authorship meets spirit not letter), AC10 (key_not_valid_at_era in verify_signature_result.schema.json; TS3 kept separate vocabulary). All 4 transition stories CLOSED + 8 changes GREEN. NOT submitting - surfaced scope decision to user (A land+followups / B build-first / C reconcile). Stack ready to submit (top 581) the moment scope is decided.
